message:
fix(vdbe): narrow mutex scope for IdxGT/IdxLE collation lookups and suppress inline_always lint

Move coll_arc.lock() from a single early guard to point-of-use inside
the two comparison branches. This keeps the mutex held only while the
comparison runs rather than across the entire opcode body, reducing
contention when other threads access the collation registry.

Also add #[allow(clippy::inline_always)] to set_reg_int to silence the
lint alongside the existing attribute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
